form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At long odds at debut, ran last of 9 at Turffontein Standside on February 14 over 1160m, 11 len behind Prayersandpromises carrying 60kg at $26. Last start second last of 11 at Vaal on March 31 over 1200m, 12 len behind Sherlock Holmes carrying 60kg at $67. Doesn't pose too much of a threat today.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, 4th of 8 at this track on March 12 over 1450m, 1.4 len behind Lone Horizon with 60kg at $2. Well fancied and not beaten far on debut. Expected to be more prominent this time.

form.formComment: Most recently 7th of 9 at Vaal on March 28 over 1400m, 7 len behind What A Warrior carrying 57kg at $101. The start before that ran last of 8 at Vaal on March 5 over 1200m, slow going 16 len behind The Bronx Bull with 60kg at $67. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.
